title: Xutoo
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Xutoo
CT-X270 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' |birth= |death=c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' gives the approximate date of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] for the events of ''[[The Cestus Deception]]''. over [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Ord Cestus Squad]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Get him home safely.''"
"''Yes, sir.|Obi-Wan Kenobi, asking Xutoo to deliver Doolb Snoil to Coruscant, which Xutoo failed to accomplish|}} '''Xutoo''', designated '''CT-X270''', was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Xutoo was chosen alongside three other [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] by [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Jangotat|Nate]] for a [[Mission to Ord Cestus|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. The [[Ord Cestus Squad|clone troopers]] served as an escort for two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and the [[Vippit]] [[barrister]] [[Doolb Snoil]]. As the mission progressed, Kenobi asked Xutoo to deliver Snoil back to the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. However, their [[Transport/Legends|transport]] was attacked in mid-air by a [[drone ship]] secretly dispatched by members of the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]], the ruling council of the [[Cestus Cybernetics]] corporation. Snoil survived the attack by using an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]], but Xutoo's transport [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was destroyed, [[Death/Legends|killing]] the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Ah, sir, we may have a problem.''"
"''Problem? Problem? Master Kenobi promised there would be no problem!''"
"''I don't think he took that into consideration, sir.|Xutoo, notifying Doolb Snoil of the attacking ship|}} CT-X270, nicknamed Xutoo, was one of the many [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] bred on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to serve in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Xutoo received special training as a [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilot]]. Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Xutoo was included in a [[Ord Cestus Squad|squad]] of four [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] handpicked by [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Jangotat|Nate]] to accompany [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Vippit]] [[Barrister]] [[Doolb Snoil]] to the planet [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were dispatched there in an attempt to prevent the local [[Cestus Cybernetics]] corporation from selling the deadly [[JK-13 security droid]]s to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. [[File:MissionToOrdCestus.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Xutoo flew Obi-Wan Kenobi and Kit Fisto to Ord Cestus.]] A military [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] brought Xutoo, Nate, and [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] [[Sirty]], [[Forry]], and [[Seefor]] to [[Centralia Memorial Spaceport]] on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where they met the Jedi and the Barrister. After the team loaded its cargo onto their [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]], Xutoo took control of the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] it to Ord Cestus. Xutoo initially landed the ship at a remote and unpopulated section of the [[Dashta plain]], where the group split up. Fisto and all the clone troopers, except for Xutoo, disembarked, intent on assembling and training the local population in order to start an insurgency should Kenobi's and Snoil's attempts at diplomacy fail. Xutoo then set course for the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[ChikatLik]], assumed a plausible landing trajectory for a ship arriving from Coruscant, and landed the transport at a landing pad, where a delegation had already been awaiting the dignitaries from the Republic. In ChikatLik, Kenobi attempted to establish a secure communications channel with Coruscant by creating a link through Xutoo at their docked ship, but a [[Star/Legends|solar]] storm disrupted the link. When the negotiations did not bear fruit, Kenobi and Fisto decided to employ deception to achieve their goals. Fisto masqueraded as a [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] working for the Confederacy and kidnapped members of the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]], the ruling body of Cestus [[Cybernetics/Legends|Cybernetics]] and the de facto rulers of the entire planet. Kenobi rescued the corporation's rulers and swayed the [[Cestian]]s to the Republic's side. However, the Jedi's fraud was exposed, thanks to a recording secretly taken by the Confederate [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]. Kenobi and Snoil were then [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|banished]] from Cestus and had to return to Coruscant empty-handed. Kenobi and Snoil returned to Xutoo's ship, and the clone pilot took off. However, Kenobi decided to continue his work on the planet, asking Xutoo to deliver Snoil safely to Coruscant, and used an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] to covertly reach Fisto's position. As soon as Kenobi left the ship, Xutoo noticed a [[drone ship]] approaching their transport. The ship had been dispatched by the Five Families, who attempted to prevent the Jedi from reaching Coruscant, since the latter had uncovered vital information that could end their rule of Cestus. The drone ship fired a number of [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] that homed in on Xutoo's transport and started attacking it. Desperately trying to evade fire, Xutoo notified Snoil of the attack and advised him to evacuate the ship on one of the remaining escape pods. Stunned by the attack, Snoil initially decided to stay aboard, but, when Xutoo told him that he would jettison the remaining pods in an attempt to distract the attacking probe droids, Snoil changed his mind, quickly boarded one of the pods, and escaped. Xutoo jettisoned the pods as he had said and performed a series of evasive maneuvers trying to evade enemy fire, but the ship was soon destroyed and Xutoo was [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Snoil managed to safely reach the ground and was picked up by the Jedi's forces. The Barrister was later killed in the course of the fight, but the overall mission was a success. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I've commenced evasive maneuvers, but I don't know. Sir, I would suggest that you follow General Kenobi's example and evacuate.|Xutoo, keeping his calm during the attack, tells Snoil to escape|}} Like all clone troopers, Xutoo stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. Raised to be a clone trooper pilot, Xutoo handled the controls of the Jedi transport with great confidence and skill. When confronted by the attacking ship, Xutoo tried to keep his calm, although there was a hint of panic in his voice as he addressed Snoil. Xutoo was determined to protect the Barrister's life and urged him to leave the ship. The clone pilot tried his best to evade the attack, using the escape pods to distract the attacking droids and successfully pulling a series of elaborate evasive maneuvers. However, these tactics could not save Xutoo's life. ==Behind the scenes== Xutoo's only appearance in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars Legends|''Legends'' continuity]] was in ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'', a [[2004]] novel written by [[Steven Barnes]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-X270 }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Clone trooper pilots]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
